---
title: "Persistence, Average and Exponential Smoothing"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
source("data_cleaning_and_dependencies.R")
```

# Seasonal Persistence
```{r}
pred_periodic = numeric(length(holdout_unemp))

for (i in 1:12) {
  pred_periodic[i] = train_unemp[(n_train)-12+i]
}

for (i in 13:length(holdout_unemp)) {
  pred_periodic[i] = holdout_unemp[i-12]
}

rmse <- sqrt(mean((holdout_unemp - pred_periodic)^2))
rmse
```


# Average
```{r}
rate_mean = mean(train_df$unemployment_rate)
rate_fc = rep(rate_mean, length(holdout_df$unemployment_rate))
rmse_rate = sqrt(mean((holdout_df$unemployment_rate - rate_fc)^2))
rmse_rate
```

# Holt-Winters Exponential Smoothing
```{r}
rate_seasonal_ts <- train_ts

hw_rate_model <- HoltWinters(rate_seasonal_ts) 
rate_fc_result <- forecast(hw_rate_model, h = length(holdout_unemp))
rate_rmse_hw <- sqrt(mean((holdout_unemp - rate_fc_result$mean)^2))
rate_rmse_hw
```
